  5. Method Details
    1. isTagged(T)
    2. getValues()

Interface Tag<T extends Keyed>

Type Parameters:
T - the type of things grouped by this tag
All Superinterfaces:
Keyed
public interface Tag<T extends Keyed> extends Keyed
Represents a tag that may be defined by the server or a resource pack to group like things together. Note that whilst all tags defined within this interface must be present in implementations, their existence is not guaranteed across future versions.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Tag<Material>
    ACACIA_LOGS
    Vanilla block tag representing all acacia log and bark variants.
    static final Tag<Material>

    Vanilla block tag representing all blocks that resemble air.
    static final Tag<Material>

    Vanilla block tag representing all hanging signs.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Set<T>
    getValues()
    Gets an immutable set of all tagged items.
    boolean
    isTagged(T item)
    Returns whether or not this tag has an entry for the specified item.

    Methods inherited from interface Keyed

    getKey

  • Field Details

    • REGISTRY_BLOCKS

      static final String REGISTRY_BLOCKS
      Key for the built in block registry.
      See Also:

    • ITEMS_TOOLS

      @Deprecated(since="1.20.6", forRemoval=true) static final Tag<Material> ITEMS_TOOLS
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      removed in Minecraft 1.20.5. Do not use. Will be removed at a later date. Until then, this constant now acts as a reference to ITEMS_BREAKS_DECORATED_POTS which largely shares the same contents of the old "minecraft:tools" tag.
      Vanilla item tag representing all tools.

  • Method Details

    • isTagged

      boolean isTagged(@NotNull T item)
      Returns whether or not this tag has an entry for the specified item.
      Parameters:
      item - to check
      Returns:
      if it is tagged

    • getValues

      @NotNull Set<T> getValues()
      Gets an immutable set of all tagged items.
      Returns:
      set of tagged items
